addons.name: Desktop MCP
addons.description: Desktop automation MCP for the AI agent: enumerate/inspect windows and UI-Automation element trees, per-window screenshots the vision model sees (PrintWindow, never steals focus), AND guarded write actions - invoke an element, set text, focus, move - gated by an exe-path scope allow-list + off-LLM host input consent, with UIA element-targeting (no synthetic mouse/keyboard), a TOCTOU re-check, a shell/terminal typing ban, and an append-only audit. Privacy redaction of sensitive apps. Ships its own AefosDesktopMcp.exe.
